name: FUSAR-R1: A Large-Scale Reasoning Model for Intelligent Interpretation of SAR Images

description: arXiv:2607.16819v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: In recent years, large-scale vision-language models have been driving a paradigm shift in intelligent remote sensing image interpretation. By incorporating textual semantic information, the cognitive expression, semantic understanding, and human-computer interaction capabilities of interpretation models have been significantly improved, achieving...
author: Yi Yang, Xiaokun Zhang, Yuxuan Li, Ruyi Zhang, Xinpeng Zhou, Haipeng Wang
